title: Elimination of Flux Trapping in Superconducting Circuits in Ambient Magnetic Fields
summary: Superconductor digital electronics and quantum computing with superconducting qubits are promising next-generation computing technologies. When cooled down or operated in the presence of a nonzero background magnetic field $B_r$, superconducting thin films comprising the circuits can trap magnetic vortices that can degrade circuit or qubit performance. In this work, we report a practical solution for eliminating flux trapped during cooldown in ambient magnetic fields, $B_r\leq 60$ $\upmu$T, based on controlled local thermal gradients and moats, etched holes in the superconducting films of the circuit. Thermal gradients created by integrated on-chip resistive heaters move vortices towards the moats, where they become trapped away from circuitry regions and pinning sites. Using magnetic imaging and electrical circuit readout, we demonstrate that this approach is capable of removing magnetic flux trapped during field cooling and magnetic flux nucleated by circuit operation. If used in an environment with basic magnetic shielding, this solution is capable of suppressing all magnetic flux in a large-scale circuit, overcoming one of the long-standing challenges preventing high-performance scalable computing using superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用集成电阻加热器产生局部热梯度，结合刻蚀凹槽（moats）来消除超导薄膜电路中磁通涡旋的实用方案，可在环境磁场≤60 μT条件下有效清除冷却过程和电路运行中产生的磁通，从而克服超导数字电子学和超导量子计算规模化发展的关键障碍。
AI.motivation: 超导数字电子学和超导量子比特在冷却或在背景磁场中运行时，超导薄膜会捕获磁通涡旋，导致电路或量子比特性能退化，这一问题长期阻碍了高性能可扩展超导计算技术的发展。
AI.method: 在超导薄膜电路中集成片上电阻加热器产生局部热梯度，同时在薄膜上刻蚀凹槽（moats）；热梯度驱动磁通涡旋向凹槽移动，使其被捕获在远离电路区域和钉扎位点的地方。
AI.result: 利用磁成像和电路电学读出，证明了该方法能够消除场冷却过程中捕获的磁通以及电路运行中产生的磁通；在环境磁场≤60 μT条件下可有效工作。
AI.conclusion: 结合基本磁屏蔽，该方案能够抑制大规模电路中的所有磁通，解决了一直以来阻碍超导高性能可扩展计算的关键挑战。

title: The Second Law, Symmetry of Time Reversal and Thermodynamic Equilibrium in Superconductors
summary: The Second law, universally applicable to all states of all sorts of matter and radiation, is undeniably the brightest jewel in the tiara of laws of thermodynamics; recall that the achievements of this law include the principle of least action, the atomistic structure of matter, the quantization of radiant heat, and much more. However, there is a significant gap in understanding the application of the Second law to magnetizing materials, especially to superconductors. This communication is targeted to fill the gap. The concepts of equilibrium and reversibility in thermodynamic processes are considered with particular attention to specifics of superconductivity. These include (1) the primary role of the field strength $\textbf{H}$ in forming magnetization; (2) the zero entropy of samples in a state of thermodynamic equilibrium; and (3) two kinds of superconducting currents in samples out of equilibrium. As shown, time reversal symmetry in superconductors is a consequence of the Second law and, therefore, is a mandatory property of these materials in a state of equilibrium. Necessary conditions for achieving the latter are framed out. Awareness of these aspects is important for advancing research on superconductivity in all kinds of superconducting materials.

AI.tldr: 本文旨在填补热力学第二定律在磁性材料（尤其是超导体）中应用的空白，重点讨论了平衡、可逆性、时间反演对称性等概念，并指出时间反演对称性是第二定律在超导体平衡态下的必然结果。
AI.motivation: 热力学第二定律在超导体等磁性材料中的应用存在显著的理解空白，作者旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过分析超导体的特殊性质（如磁场强度H的主要作用、平衡态下零熵、非平衡态下的两类超导电流），论证时间反演对称性是第二定律的推论。
AI.result: 证明超导体在平衡态下时间反演对称性是第二定律的必然结果，并给出了达成平衡态的必要条件。
AI.conclusion: 理解这些方面对于推进各类超导材料的研究至关重要。

title: Thickness dependence of diode efficiency in superconducting Fe(Se,Te)/FeTe thin-film heterostructure devices
summary: The superconducting diode effect (SDE) is a nonreciprocal transport phenomenon, in which the superconducting critical current density depends on the polarity of the current. It has attracted recent attention because of its potential applications to a rectifier without energy dissipation. While SDE has been observed in a wide range of superconducting materials with broken inversion symmetry as well as thin-film heterostructures, the microscopic origin linking structural inversion asymmetry of electronic band, spin-orbit interaction, and vortex pinning remains to be clarified. In this study, we investigate SDE in Fe(Se,Te)/FeTe heterostructure devices as a function of the superconducting Fe(Se,Te) layer thickness tFST to elucidate the role of structural inversion asymmetry on the vortex-induced SDE. We find that the SDE efficiency monotonically increases with increasing tFST, which can be understood by considering that the band bending in the bulk Fe(Se,Te) layer induces the structural inversion asymmetry and thus, the Rashba spin-orbit interaction. In addition, we demonstrate almost 100% rectification for the Fe(Se,Te)/FeTe heterostructure devices in half- and full-wave oscillation configurations. Our findings point out the importance of structural architecture for realization of highly efficient SDE devices based on superconducting thin-film heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Fe(Se,Te)/FeTe异质结中的超导二极管效应（SDE），发现SDE效率随Fe(Se,Te)层厚度增加而单调增大，这归因于体层能带弯曲导致的结构反演不对称性和Rashba自旋轨道耦合，并实现了近乎100%的整流效率。
AI.motivation: 虽然SDE已在多种超导材料中被观察到，但其微观起源——特别是结构反演不对称性、自旋轨道相互作用和涡旋钉扎之间的关联——仍不清楚。本文旨在通过调控Fe(Se,Te)层厚度来阐明结构反演不对称性对涡旋诱导SDE的作用。
AI.method: 制备不同Fe(Se,Te)层厚度的Fe(Se,Te)/FeTe异质结器件，系统测量SDE效率随厚度的变化规律，并结合能带弯曲和Rashba自旋轨道耦合机制进行分析。
AI.result: SDE效率随Fe(Se,Te)层厚度增加而单调增大；在半波和全波振荡配置下实现了接近100%的整流效率。
AI.conclusion: 体层能带弯曲诱导的结构反演不对称性是产生高效SDE的关键，结构设计对于实现高性能超导二极管器件至关重要。

title: Imaging geometry- and phase-controlled spectra in a surface-state Andreev cavity
comment: 12-page manuscript with 7 main/extended-data figures and 19-page Supplementary Information with 11 supplementary figures
summary: Andreev cavities provide a setting in which superconducting proximity spectra are shaped by phase-coherent electron-hole motion along extended trajectories. While such Andreev physics is well established in transport, local spectra in two-dimensional cavities remain largely unexplored in real space. Here we use scanning tunnelling spectroscopy to study confined Cu(111) surface states coupled to superconducting Nb(110). The in-plane magnetic-field scale for the collapse of the resolved low-energy spectrum is controlled by the transverse extent available to Andreev trajectories, while the zero-field excitation energy evolves with the characteristic trajectory length. These trends, together with spatial variations within individual islands and the response to vortex phase textures, are captured by a minimal semiclassical phase-accumulation picture. Our results identify geometry-defined Andreev trajectories as a design principle for phase-coherent superconducting cavities accessible by local spectroscopy.

AI.tldr: 本文利用扫描隧道谱学研究了与超导Nb(110)耦合的受限Cu(111)表面态中的Andreev腔，发现低能谱的坍塌磁场由Andreev轨迹的横向范围控制，零场激发能由轨迹特征长度决定，这些现象以及空间变化和涡旋响应均可通过半经典相位累积模型描述，揭示了几何定义Andreev轨迹可作为局域谱学探测超导腔的设计原则。
AI.motivation: 二维空腔中的Andreev物理在实空间局域谱学方面尚缺乏系统探索，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用扫描隧道谱学技术，研究受限Cu(111)表面态与超导Nb(110)的耦合，结合半经典相位累积模型分析实验结果。
AI.result: 发现低能谱坍塌的面内磁场尺度由Andreev轨迹的横向范围决定，零场激发能由轨迹特征长度控制；空间变化和涡旋相位织构响应与模型吻合。
AI.conclusion: 几何定义的Andreev轨迹可作为设计相位相干超导腔的关键原则，适用于局域谱学探测。

title: Collection, characterization, and precision measurement of levitated charged nanoparticles
comment: 12 pages, 12 figures. Movie version of Figure 7 is available in ancillary files
summary: We describe apparatus and experimental procedures for high stability precision measurements of levitated nanoscale particles confined in an ion trap in high vacuum. We discuss methods for particle generation and collection using electrospray emission, for rapid characterization by direct imaging of thermal motion, and for transfer of the particle from the trap where it is collected to a separate analysis trap in order to achieve better vacuum and lower noise. In the analysis trap at high vacuum (pressure $p\simeq10^{-8}$ Torr), we employ thermostatic control of the trapped particle oscillation amplitudes, allowing long-term, precision measurements of oscillation frequencies, from which the charge to mass ratio ($Q/M$) can be deduced. Under these conditions, we achieve $Q/M$ measurement precision approaching $10^{-5}$. This sensitivity will enable, for example, investigations of the surface chemistry of $μ$m-scale levitated materials in ultra-high vacuum environments.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种在高真空中对离子阱中悬浮纳米颗粒进行高稳定性精密测量的装置和实验方法，实现了电荷质量比(Q/M)测量精度接近10⁻⁵，可用于研究微米级悬浮材料的表面化学。
AI.motivation: 为了实现高真空环境下悬浮纳米颗粒的高精度、长期稳定测量，进而支持微米级悬浮材料表面化学等前沿研究。
AI.method: 采用电喷雾发射产生和收集颗粒，通过直接成像热运动快速表征，将颗粒从收集阱转移到分析阱以获得更好真空和更低噪声。在分析阱高真空(10⁻⁸ Torr)中，采用恒温控制悬浮颗粒振荡幅度，实现振荡频率的长期精密测量，从而推导电荷质量比(Q/M)。
AI.result: 在高真空条件下实现了Q/M测量精度接近10⁻⁵。
AI.conclusion: 该高精度测量方法将能够支持超高真空环境下微米级悬浮材料表面化学研究等前沿应用。

title: Direct imaging of enantiomer-specific orientation dynamics in unidirectionally rotating chiral molecules
summary: Selectively controlling the dynamics of molecular enantiomers underlies advances across chemistry, biology, and physics, yet direct imaging of enantiomer-specific motion has so far remained elusive. Here, we image ultrafast enantioselective orientation dynamics in isolated chiral molecules. Unidirectional coherent rotation induced by a femtosecond laser-pulse pair generates equal and opposite out-of-plane orientations of the two enantiomers. Applying this scheme to 2-methyloxirane, we follow the rotational wave packets by time-resolved Coulomb explosion imaging with two orthogonally arranged detectors. The measured angular distributions reveal that the unidirectional rotation is identical for both enantiomers, while the out-of-plane orientations are mirror images that persist through both early-time quasi-classical and quantum dynamics regimes, in quantitative agreement with simulations. We demonstrate that full angular distributions provide richer dynamical information, with some qualitatively different distributions yielding similar orientation factors upon integration. Our approach opens a route to real-time observation and control of chiral dynamics in the gas phase.

AI.tldr: 本文通过飞秒激光脉冲对实现了对孤立手性分子中对映体超快取向动力学的直接成像，观察到两种对映体具有镜像对称的取向行为，为实时观测和操控气相手性动力学开辟了新途径。
AI.motivation: 对映体选择性控制对化学、生物和物理学至关重要，但直接成像对映体特异性运动此前一直未能实现。
AI.method: 利用飞秒激光脉冲对诱导单向相干旋转，结合时间分辨库仑爆炸成像和两个正交探测器，测量对映体的角分布。
AI.result: 两种对映体的单向旋转相同，但离面取向呈镜像对称，在早期准经典和量子动力学区域均持续存在，与模拟定量一致。
AI.conclusion: 全角分布提供更丰富的动力学信息，该方法为气相手性动力学的实时观测和控制提供了途径。

title: Mosaic: A Benchmark Suite for Differentiable Physics Solvers
comment: 32 pages, 24 figures, 3 tables. Code available at https://github.com/pasteurlabs/mosaic
summary: Differentiable partial differential equation (PDE) solvers underpin solver-in-the-loop ML training, gradient-based optimal control, and inverse problems, yet the practical cost of obtaining correct, usable gradients from a given solver on a given problem is largely undocumented. Integration effort, computational cost, gradient accuracy, and numerical conditioning vary widely across solvers and are discoverable only by trial and error. We introduce Mosaic, an extensible benchmarking framework for differentiable PDE solvers that standardizes access to solver gradients. Each solver is packaged as a containerized component (Tesseract) exposing a uniform gradient API regardless of language or automatic differentiation (AD) strategy, enabling researchers to evaluate, compare, and build on non-trivial physical solvers. Our evaluation of 14 solvers across fluid dynamics, structural mechanics, and heat transfer demonstrates that the benchmark surfaces practically relevant differences: order-of-magnitude variation in computational cost and Jacobian conditioning, alongside structural incompatibilities that eliminate solvers from realistic tasks entirely. Despite this variation, all solvers that produce gradients converge to similar optima, indicating that the practical barriers are memory limits, numerical stability, and setup compatibility rather than gradient accuracy alone. Mosaic is open-source and available at https://github.com/pasteurlabs/mosaic.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了 Mosaic，一个可扩展的微分方程求解器梯度基准测试框架，通过标准化梯度 API 和容器化封装，系统评估了14个求解器在计算成本、雅可比矩阵条件数等方面的差异，发现尽管梯度精度差异显著，但所有能收敛的求解器最终都能达到相似最优解，实际瓶颈在于内存、数值稳定性和兼容性。
AI.motivation: 当前可微 PDE 求解器的梯度获取方式多样，集成成本、计算成本、梯度精度和数值条件在不同求解器间差异巨大，且缺乏系统性记录和标准化评估工具，研究者只能通过试错来发现这些差异。
AI.method: 提出 Mosaic 框架，将每个求解器封装为容器化组件（Tesseract），提供统一的梯度 API，以标准化方式访问不同语言和自动微分策略的求解器梯度，从而实现对14个求解器在流体动力学、结构力学和热传导领域的系统评估。
AI.result: 14个求解器的评估显示，计算成本和雅可比矩阵条件数存在数量级差异，且部分求解器因结构不兼容而无法用于实际任务。然而，所有能产生梯度的求解器最终都收敛到相似的最优解。
AI.conclusion: 求解器选择的实际障碍主要在于内存限制、数值稳定性和设置兼容性，而非梯度精度本身。Mosaic 为可微 PDE 求解器的选择和比较提供了标准化基准。

title: Ultrafast non-thermal suppression of ferroelectricity by carrier screening in LiNbO3
summary: Ferroelectric materials are key to energy-efficient electronics, memory, and optical applications. While charge carriers typically screen and suppress ferroelectricity, their role under nonequilibrium conditions remains elusive. Here, we use femtosecond laser pulses to liberate trapped carriers in LiNbO3 and track the response using time-resolved second-harmonic generation and stimulated Raman scattering. Even dilute photoexcited carriers induce a rapid yet enduring suppression of polarization and Raman susceptibility. Fluence- and temperature-dependent analyses confirm the suppression is non-thermal and arises from transient carrier screening. These findings reveal an efficient, reversible, and symmetry-preserving mechanism to modulate ferroelectricity on ultrafast timescales, offering a new route to control ferroic and competing quantum phases.

AI.tldr: 本文利用飞秒激光脉冲在LiNbO₃中激发载流子，发现即使稀薄的光激发载流子也能通过瞬态屏蔽效应快速、持久地抑制铁电性和拉曼极化率，揭示了一种高效、可逆、对称性保持的超快调控铁电性新机制。
AI.motivation: 铁电材料在电子、存储和光学领域至关重要，但载流子在非平衡态下对铁电性的影响尚不清楚，现有研究多关注平衡态下载流子屏蔽抑制铁电性的现象。
AI.method: 使用飞秒激光脉冲激发LiNbO₃中束缚的载流子，通过时间分辨二次谐波产生（SHG）和受激拉曼散射（SRS）追踪铁电响应。
AI.result: 即使极低浓度的光激发载流子也能快速且持久地抑制极化强度和拉曼极化率；通过变化光通量和温度的实验证实该抑制是非热效应，源于瞬态载流子屏蔽。
AI.conclusion: 发现了一种高效、可逆、保持对称性的超快调控铁电性新机制，为控制铁性及竞争量子相提供了新途径。

title: Jarzynski equality for counterwork under reversed memory-filtered driving
summary: We introduce a counterwork functional generated by a sign-inverting memory-filtered effective protocol. Given an imposed protocol $λ(t)$, the effective protocol $Λ(t)$ is obtained by applying an active protocol-memory kernel to $\dotλ(t)$, rather than by invoking a passive bath response. The counterwork is then the ordinary Hamiltonian work associated with $H(Γ,Λ(t))$, so that Jarzynski's equality applies directly to it. When $Λ(t)$ reverses the endpoints of $λ(t)$, the corresponding free-energy difference satisfies $ΔF_C=-ΔF_W$, and the exponential average of the counterwork is the reciprocal of that of the original work. We derive the kernel normalization realizing this reversed displacement and show, by Jensen's inequality, that the product of the exponentials of the average work and counterwork is bounded by unity, implying $\langle C\rangle+\langle W\rangle\geq0$. Thus negative average counterwork is possible only when compensated by the average work of the original operation. We further discuss the counteroperation under incomplete thermodynamic information, showing that the robust strategy is to enforce endpoint reversal while minimizing dissipated counterwork.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种由符号反转的记忆滤波有效协议生成的反工作函数。通过主动协议记忆核对原协议变化率进行滤波得到有效协议，进而定义反工作。当有效协议反转原协议端点时，反工作的自由能差与原工作相反，其指数平均值为原工作指数平均值的倒数。研究发现平均反工作与原工作之和的非负性，并讨论了不完全热力学信息下的优化策略。
AI.motivation: 传统Jarzynski等式适用于被动浴响应下的功分布，作者希望引入一种主动记忆滤波机制，使得反工作也能直接满足Jarzynski等式，从而建立原工作与反工作之间的对偶关系。
AI.method: 通过主动协议记忆核对原协议变化率进行滤波，生成有效协议Λ(t)，定义反工作为与Λ(t)相关的普通哈密顿功。推导核归一化条件实现端点反转，利用Jarzynski等式和Jensen不等式建立功与反功的约束关系。
AI.result: 当Λ(t)反转λ(t)端点时，ΔF_C = -ΔF_W；反工作的指数平均值为原工作指数平均值的倒数；⟨C⟩+⟨W⟩≥0，即平均反工作为负时必须有原工作的正平均功补偿。
AI.conclusion: 建立了原工作与反工作之间的对偶约束关系，为主动控制下的热力学功测量提供了新框架，并讨论了不完全信息下实现端点反转同时最小化耗散反工作的鲁棒策略。

title: Excitation of Collective Modes in a Chiral Superfluid by Thermal Quench
summary: Based on time-dependent Ginzburg-Landau field theory we show that rapid cooling through the second-order phase transition into superfluid \Hea\ excites collective modes of newly formed chiral domains, in addition to topological defects that are formed via the Kibble-Zurek mechanism. Simulations of temperature quenches in the presence of Gaussian space-time white noise generate a highly excited inhomogeneous condensate. Large-scale simulations exhibit a complex network of domain walls and vortices. We report results for the excitation of bosonic collective modes by thermal noise as well as nonequilibrium temperature quenches, followed by coarsening dynamics tracked in terms of the Fourier components of the order parameter amplitudes. For thermal states, the spectrum of bosonic excitations is defined by a power spectral density (PSD) for each mode, which is sensitive to the Langevin damping. For weak damping the PSD onsets sharply at the frequency corresponding to the mass of the bosonic mode, then decays as $1/ω$. We also track the dynamics of the order parameter following a temperature quench. We report results for the scaling exponents of Kibble-Zurek freeze-out time and correlation length as a function of quench rate for several damping rates. The dynamical exponent $z$ is shown to transition smoothly from $z=1$ to $z=2$ as the damping is increased, while the correlation length exponent, $ν\approx 1/2$, is independent of damping.

AI.tldr: 本文基于含时Ginzburg-Landau场论，研究快速冷却通过二级相变进入超流He-A时，除Kibble-Zurek机制产生的拓扑缺陷外，还会激发新形成手征畴的集体模式。模拟揭示了畴壁和涡旋的复杂网络，并报告了热噪声激发玻色集体模式及非平衡温度淬火后的粗化动力学结果。
AI.motivation: 超越传统仅关注拓扑缺陷的Kibble-Zurek机制研究，探索快速相变过程中集体模式的激发及其动力学行为。
AI.method: 基于含时Ginzburg-Landau场论，结合Gaussian空间-时间白噪声进行温度淬火模拟，通过序参量振幅的傅里叶分量追踪粗化动力学，并分析功率谱密度（PSD）。
AI.result: 1) 弱阻尼下PSD在玻色模质量对应的频率处尖锐起始，后以1/ω衰减；2) 动力学指数z随阻尼增加从z=1平滑过渡到z=2；3) 关联长度指数ν≈1/2，与阻尼无关。
AI.conclusion: 快速冷却通过二级相变不仅产生Kibble-Zurek拓扑缺陷，还激发集体模式；阻尼对动力学临界指数有显著影响，但关联长度指数对阻尼不敏感。

title: Multiphoton Fingerprints of Altermagnetic Spin Splittings
summary: We systematically investigate multiphoton absorption as a polarization-resolved nonlinear optical probe of planar altermagnets (ALMs). We show that the angular harmonic of the altermagnetic spin splitting fixes the lowest optical absorption at which a symmetry-selective response appears: two-photon absorption for $d$-wave order, four-photon absorption for $g$-wave order, and six-photon absorption for $i$-wave order. In each case, there exists a polarization channel locked to the symmetry harmonic of the altermagnetic texture in which the direct $n$-photon contribution to the transition matrix element is absent. This changes the frequency scaling of the absorption rate relative to other polarization channels and provides a direct optical fingerprint of the underlying altermagnetic harmonic. Our results establish a hierarchy of nonlinear spectroscopic signatures that distinguishes $d$-, $g$-, and $i$-wave altermagnetic spin splittings beyond linear response.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了多光子吸收作为平面交变磁体（ALMs）的偏振分辨非线性光学探针。发现交变磁自旋分裂的角谐波决定了最低光学吸收阶次：d波对应双光子吸收，g波对应四光子吸收，i波对应六光子吸收。每种情况下存在特定偏振通道，其中直接n光子贡献缺失，导致吸收率的频率标度变化，为交变磁谐波提供直接光学指纹。
AI.motivation: 现有线性光学响应无法区分d波、g波和i波交变磁自旋分裂，需要发展超越线性响应的非线性光谱方法来识别交变磁体的不同对称性谐波。
AI.method: 通过系统分析多光子吸收过程中偏振分辨的非线性光学响应，研究不同交变磁谐波（d波、g波、i波）对应的吸收阶次及其偏振通道选择性。
AI.result: 1) 交变磁自旋分裂的角谐波决定最低光学吸收阶次：d波→双光子吸收，g波→四光子吸收，i波→六光子吸收；2) 每种情况下存在特定偏振通道，其中直接n光子贡献缺失，改变吸收率的频率标度。
AI.conclusion: 建立了区分d波、g波和i波交变磁自旋分裂的非线性光谱层级结构，为超越线性响应的交变磁体光学表征提供了新方法。

title: Nonlinear Freezing of Vibrational Polariton Transport via Mesoscale Simulations
summary: Two-dimensional real-space imaging of vibrational polariton transport in planar Fabry--Pérot microcavities is numerically simulated via the mesoscale cavity molecular dynamics approach, which self-consistently propagates $\sim\!2\times10^4$ realistic molecular simulation cells on a two-dimensional grid coupled to the same number of cavity modes. Beyond the well-known polariton ballistic-to-diffusive turnover in the linear response regime, these atomistic simulations reveal a nonlinear freezing mechanism of vibrational polariton transport, i.e., under strong pumping of the upper polariton, the initially ballistically propagating upper polariton completely freezes and localizes energy to molecules at specific locations. This mechanism originates from pump-induced breaking of the in-plane translation symmetry: significant molecular excitations at the pulse hot spot broaden the polariton density of states, thus funneling population to the $k_{\parallel}\rightarrow 0$ band edge with vanishing group velocities.

AI.tldr: 本文通过介观腔分子动力学方法，数值模拟了二维法布里-珀罗微腔中振动极化激元的输运过程。研究发现，除了众所周知的弹道-扩散转变外，还存在一种非线性冻结机制：在上极化激元强泵浦下，初始弹道传播的上极化激元完全冻结并将能量局域在特定分子位置。该机制源于泵浦诱导的平面对称性破缺，使得极化激元密度态展宽，导致粒子向群速度为零的能带边缘汇集。
AI.motivation: 探索振动极化激元在微腔中的输运行为，特别是非线性强泵浦条件下的新型传输机制。
AI.method: 采用介观腔分子动力学方法，数值模拟约2×10^4个真实分子模拟单元在二维网格上耦合等量腔模的自洽传播。
AI.result: 发现上极化激元在强泵浦下会出现完全冻结和能量局域化现象，打破了传统弹道-扩散输运的认知。
AI.conclusion: 强泵浦导致平面对称性破缺，极化激元密度态展宽，粒子向零群速度的带边汇集，从而引发输运冻结。

title: Mapping the Growth of Two-Dimensional $π$-Conjugated Polymers on Au(111): Organometallic Intermediates and Edge Terminations
summary: Kagome lattices provide an exciting space for the exploration of graphene-like $π$-conjugated molecular systems with flat bands. Using heterotriangulene-derived precursors, along with an on-surface Ullmann coupling process, makes growing polymers with Kagome lattices accessible and straightforward. Here, we use scanning tunneling microscopy alongside high-resolution atomic force microscopy to examine the evolution of tribromotrioxaazatriangulene on Au(111) into ordered, covalent films. Using density functional theory and scanning probe methods, we find previously unreported organometallic intermediate states involving Au adatoms incorporated within the growing polymer lattice. We also find that a majority of polymer edges remain brominated up to 250 $^{\circ}$C and a large number of edges bonded to Au adatoms coordinated to an adjacent bromine atom. These observations suggest that residual bromine could play a role in stabilizing the polymer edges to Au adatoms and thereby influence the growth pathways that lead to ordered Kagome polymer lattices.

AI.tldr: 本文利用扫描隧道显微镜、原子力显微镜和密度泛函理论，研究了在金(111)表面上由三溴三氧三氮三角烯前驱体通过Ullmann偶联生长Kagome聚合物的过程，发现了之前未报道的含金吸附原子的有机金属中间态，并揭示残余溴在稳定聚合物边缘和影响有序Kagome晶格生长路径中的关键作用。
AI.motivation: Kagome晶格为探索类石墨烯π共轭分子系统提供了重要平台，但对其生长过程中的中间状态和边缘化学环境的理解尚不充分。本文旨在揭示Kagome聚合物生长中金吸附原子的角色及残余溴的影响。
AI.method: 采用扫描隧道显微镜(STM)和高分辨率原子力显微镜(AFM)表征三溴三氧三氮三角烯在Au(111)上的演化过程，结合密度泛函理论(DFT)进行理论计算。
AI.result: 发现了含金吸附原子的有机金属中间态；多数聚合物边缘在250°C下仍保持溴化状态；大量边缘存在与相邻溴原子配位的金吸附原子。
AI.conclusion: 残余溴可能在稳定聚合物边缘与金吸附原子的结合中发挥重要作用，进而影响Kagome聚合物有序晶格的生长路径。

title: Rare Events Govern Defect Formation under Weak Symmetry Breaking
summary: Crossing a continuous phase transition out of equilibrium typically generates topological defects whose density obeys a universal power-law scaling predicted by the Kibble-Zurek mechanism. Recent numerical studies have revealed systematic deviations from this scaling in the presence of weak explicit symmetry breaking, manifested as an additional exponential suppression of defect formation. However, the origin of this correction and a general theoretical framework to describe it have remained elusive. Here, using large-deviation theory, we show that defect formation under weak symmetry breaking is controlled by rare fluctuations that drive local regions into the disfavored symmetry-broken state. This mechanism yields a closed-form expression for the defect density in arbitrary dimensions, valid in the weak-field and weak-noise limits. These theoretical predictions are verified through direct simulations of stochastic Ginzburg-Landau models in one and two spatial dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大偏差理论揭示了弱显式对称性破缺下缺陷形成的指数抑制机制，推导出任意维度的缺陷密度闭式解，并在随机Ginzburg-Landau模型中得到验证。
AI.motivation: Kibble-Zurek机制预测了非平衡连续相变中拓扑缺陷密度的普适幂律标度，但近期数值研究发现弱显式对称性破缺会导致系统性的指数抑制偏离，其起源和理论框架尚不明确。
AI.method: 利用大偏差理论（large-deviation theory）分析弱对称性破缺下的缺陷形成过程，推导出任意维度的缺陷密度闭式表达式，适用于弱场和弱噪声极限。
AI.result: 发现缺陷形成受限于驱动局部区域进入不利对称性破缺态的稀有涨落，得到了缺陷密度的闭式解，并在一维和二维随机Ginzburg-Landau模型模拟中得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 建立了弱对称性破缺下缺陷形成的统一理论框架，成功解释了Kibble-Zurek机制的指数修正偏离现象。

title: Magnetic long-range order at finite temperature in two-dimensional hyperbolic lattices
summary: Infrared singularities of gapless Goldstone modes preclude magnetic long-range order at finite temperature in conventional two-dimensional systems. By studying the spin-$S$ Heisenberg model on regular tilings of the hyperbolic plane, we show that this obstruction is absent in negatively curved space. Using spin-wave theory, we find that the zero-energy collective modes required by symmetry carry vanishing local spectral weight and are separated from the thermodynamic bulk magnon continuum by a finite gap in the bulk local spectral density. As a result, local transverse correlations remain short ranged, with a finite correlation length, despite the presence of Goldstone modes associated with the broken SO(3) spin-rotation symmetry. Stronger negative curvature is found to suppress quantum fluctuations in bulk thermodynamic quantities, pushing the ordered state toward "mean-field-like" behavior. We further estimate the ordering temperature from the thermal spin-wave correction to the ordered moment. These results establish hyperbolic geometry as a route to finite-temperature magnetic order that circumvents the Mermin-Wagner obstruction without breaking or modifying the continuous symmetry.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文研究发现，在双曲几何（负曲率空间）中，二维系统的Goldstone模红外奇点问题被规避，使得即使存在连续对称性破缺，也能在有限温度下实现磁长程序。研究表明零能集体模的局域谱权重为零，并且与体态热力学磁振子连续谱之间存在有限能隙，因此局域横向关联仍为短程的。更强的负曲率会抑制量子涨落，使系统趋向平均场行为。
AI.motivation: 传统二维系统中，无间隙的Goldstone模的红外奇点阻碍了有限温度下的磁长程序（Mermin-Wagner定理）。作者希望探索在负曲率空间（双曲几何）中是否存在规避这一障碍的可能，而无需破坏或修改连续对称性。
AI.method: 在双曲平面的规则镶嵌上研究自旋-S Heisenberg模型，采用自旋波理论（spin-wave theory）进行分析，计算局域谱权重、体态热力学磁振子连续谱的能隙以及热自旋波修正对有序矩的影响。
AI.result: 零能集体模携带的局域谱权重为零，且与体态热力学磁振子连续谱之间存在有限能隙；局域横向关联仍为短程的，具有有限关联长度；更强的负曲率抑制量子涨落，使有序态趋向平均场行为。
AI.conclusion: 双曲几何提供了一条在有限温度下实现磁有序的途径，能够在不破坏或修改连续对称性的前提下规避Mermin-Wagner障碍。

title: Metamagnetism in UTe2: the roles of itinerancy and localization
summary: The metamagnetic transition in UTe$_2$ plays a key role in stabilizing two enigmatic field-induced superconducting phases. One of these phases (SC2) is truncated by the transition, lying directly below it, while the other (SC3) sits predominantly above it and appears to be stabilized because of it. While numerous pulsed field studies have examined this transition, comparatively few steady field experiments have investigated it. Here we report a suite of measurements of metamgnetism in UTe$_2$, at ambient pressure by torque magnetometry and extraction magnetometry techniques, and of the magnetoconductance under pressure. Our steady field measurements resolve a complex sub-structure within the transition, with separate features that possess different temperature evolutions, pointing to distinct contributions from itinerant and localized moments. The itinerant contribution might relate to a possible spin-density wave state. We theoretically model the evolution of Kondo and RKKY interactions and propose that the SC2 state is stabilized under pressure due to the collapse of magnetic anisotropy, leading to an enhancement of longitudinal spin fluctuations along the hard $b$ axis, which are pair-forming in the $p$-wave channel.

AI.tldr: 本文通过稳态磁场实验研究UTe₂中的变磁相变，发现其具有复杂亚结构（包含巡游和局域磁矩贡献），并理论提出SC2超导相在压力下稳定的机制源于磁各向异性坍塌导致沿b轴的纵向自旋涨落增强。
AI.motivation: UTe₂中的变磁相变对稳定两个场致超导相（SC2和SC3）至关重要，但此前稳态磁场实验研究较少，相变内部精细结构及压力下超导相稳定机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 采用扭矩磁强法、提拉磁强法测量常压下变磁相变，结合压力下磁导测量；同时理论上模拟Kondo和RKKY相互作用的演化。
AI.result: 稳态测量揭示变磁相变内部分离出多个不同温度演化的特征子结构，对应巡游和局域磁矩的不同贡献；巡游成分可能与自旋密度波态相关。理论表明压力下磁各向异性坍塌增强了沿硬b轴的纵向自旋涨落。
AI.conclusion: SC2相在压力下稳定是由于磁各向异性坍塌导致沿b轴纵向自旋涨落增强，该涨落在p波通道中具有配对形成作用。

title: Confined exciton polaron in MoS$_2$ on twisted-hBN
summary: The simple electrostatic picture of a trion is that of an excess charge inducing an exciton polarization and binding closer (farther) to the hole (electron) side of it. Trion formation can be forbidden when such spontaneous rearrangement of charges is not allowed by the application of external perturbation, such as electric field. Here we test this hypothesis experimentally using a non-monotonic electric field. We realize this scenario by imprinting the ferroelectric domains at the AA-stacked twisted-hBN (t-hBN) interface onto a monolayer of MoS2 placed over it. The spatially varying in-plane electric field around the domain wall serves the dual purpose of (a) confining and polarizing the 2D exciton in the domain wall, and (b) depleting the free charge carriers from the domain wall. We observe a large quantized exciton splitting confirming strong exciton confinement in the domain wall. Forced by the confining potential, the electron side of the polarized exciton lies closer to the domain with accumulated free electrons, which should ideally prevent any trion formation. Contrary to the laid hypothesis, we observe signatures of quantized charged exciton emission, with an inter-level splitting that mimics the level-splitting of the quantized excitons. This paradox is explained using the many-body picture of exciton polaron, where a conduction band hole attractively binds the polarized exciton and the electron Fermi sea. The results provide a definitive way to unambiguously discern exciton polaron from trion.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在MoS₂单层上叠加铁电畴结构的AA堆叠扭曲六方氮化硼(t-hBN)，产生空间变化的非单调电场，实验检验了静电极化图像中三子形成的条件。发现即使在极化激子电子侧靠近自由电子积累区域、传统三子形成被禁止的情况下，仍观测到量子化带电激子发射，表明需要用激子极化子（exciton polaron）的多体图像来解释，从而提供了区分三子与激子极化子的明确方法。
AI.motivation: 传统静电图像认为三子是过剩电荷诱导激子极化，而外加电场可通过阻止电荷自发重排来禁止三子形成。作者想通过非单调电场实验检验这一假设是否成立。
AI.method: 在MoS₂单层上叠加AA堆叠的扭曲六方氮化硼(t-hBN)，利用其铁电畴界面产生空间变化的非单调面内电场。该电场既在畴壁处约束并极化二维激子，又耗尽畴壁的自由载流子，从而创造三子形成被禁止的条件，并观测其发光行为。
AI.result: 观察到量子化激子能级分裂，证实了强的激子约束。同时，在传统图像预期三子不会形成的条件下，仍观测到量子化带电激子发射信号，其能级间距与量子化激子一致，与简单静电假设相悖。
AI.conclusion: 该悖论无法用三子的简单静电图像解释，必须采用激子极化子的多体图像：导带空穴吸引性地束缚极化激子与电子费米海。结果为明确区分三子与激子极化子提供了决定性实验方法。

title: FMO-xTB: Fragment molecular orbital method with GFN1-xTB for large-scale quantum-mechanical simulations
summary: We present the fragment molecular orbital method (FMO) combined with the GFN1-xTB extended tight-binding approach (FMO-xTB) for efficient quantum-mechanical calculations of large molecular systems. Both the two-body (FMO2) and three-body (FMO3) expansions are formulated, and fully analytic energy gradients including the response contribution from the self-consistent embedding potential are derived and implemented. The FMO-xTB method inherits the broad element coverage of GFN1-xTB, which employs element-specific rather than atom-pair-specific parameters and is parameterized for all spd-block elements up to radon(Z = 86), representing a significant practical advantage over FMO- DFTB approaches. The accuracy of FMO-xTB is systematically benchmarked against non-fragmented xTB calculations for water clusters, anthracene aggregates, and pentacene supercells. FMO3-xTB reproduces the reference energies with deviations on the order of 10^-4 Hartree for organic semiconductor systems. The covalent bond fragmentation capability using the hybrid orbital projection (HOP) boundary treatment is also implemented with fully analytic gradients and validated for polyalanine alpha-helices and B-DNA double helices, yielding FMO3-xTB energy deviations on the order of 10^-6 Hartree for polyalanine and in the millihartree range for B-DNA. Near-linear scaling is achieved with effective scaling exponents between b= 1.06 and b= 1.28, compared to cubic scaling for non-fragmented xTB. Parallelization over multiple CPU cores yields significant speed ups, and a complete energy and gradient evaluation of a pentacene supercell containing 23760 atoms is feasible within minutes on a single computing node, enabling routine molecular dynamics simulations of systems with tens of thousands of atoms. The method is implemented in the DIALECT software package.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FMO-xTB方法，结合片段分子轨道法和GFN1-xTB紧束缚方法，实现对大型分子系统的高效量子力学计算。该方法支持二体和三体展开，具有全分析能量梯度、宽元素覆盖（Z≤86）、近线性标度等优势，可在单计算节点上数分钟内完成含23760个原子的并五苯超胞能量与梯度计算。
AI.motivation: 大型分子系统的量子力学计算面临计算成本过高的问题，现有FMO-DFTB方法受限于原子对参数，元素覆盖范围有限。作者旨在开发一种结合FMO与GFN1-xTB的方法，利用其元素特异性参数优势，实现高效、准确且适用于多种元素的大规模分子系统量子力学计算。
AI.method: 将片段分子轨道法（FMO）与GFN1-xTB扩展紧束缚方法相结合，分别实现二体（FMO2）和三体（FMO3）展开；推导并实现了包含自洽嵌入势响应贡献的全分析能量梯度；采用杂化轨道投影（HOP）边界处理实现共价键断裂；通过并行化实现近线性标度计算。
AI.result: FMO3-xTB对有机半导体体系能量偏差约10^-4 Hartree；多聚丙氨酸能量偏差约10^-6 Hartree，B-DNA偏差在毫哈特里量级；有效标度指数b=1.06~1.28（非片段化xTB为立方标度）；含23760原子的并五苯超胞可在数分钟内完成计算。
AI.conclusion: FMO-xTB方法结合了FMO的高效性和GFN1-xTB的宽元素覆盖优势，实现了对含数万原子体系的高精度量子力学计算，并支持常规分子动力学模拟，在DIALECT软件包中实现。

title: A BRAVE Alloy Design Campaign (Bayesian Risk-aware Alloy discoVery and Exploration)
comment: Main article including appendix - 30 pages. Supplemental information - 24 pages. Link to github repository is included for code and data in the project
summary: In constrained alloy optimization, the compositions with the highest performance potential often reside at the boundary of phase stability -- where the risk of experimental failure is also highest. This work demonstrates this principle through a risk-aware Bayesian optimization campaign on single-phase FCC high-entropy alloys in the Al-V-Cr-Mn-Fe-Co-Ni-Cu system. A learned feasibility classifier, integrated directly into the multi-objective acquisition function, probabilistically penalizes candidates likely to produce failed experiments while preserving access to high-performing boundary compositions. From approximately 27,000 CALPHAD-screened candidates, 48 alloys were synthesized over three closed-loop iterations targeting five objectives (yield strength, UTS/YS ratio, strain at UTS, dynamic-to-quasi-static hardness ratio, and simulated depth of penetration), exploring 0.12\% of the feasible space. Two compositional regimes emerged: a V-rich, Ni-rich high-strength regime (UTS up to ${\sim}1480$~MPa at 50% elongation) and a Mn-containing high-ductility regime (UTS/YS up to 4.20 at $>$50% elongation). Among feasible alloys, vanadium simultaneously drives yield strength ($r = 0.84$) and sigma-phase formation ($r = 0.54$ with infeasibility); at V = 24~at.%, the three strongest alloys and three sigma failures share the same compositional point. Additionally, the strongest performing alloys cluster in a narrow region of compositional space (V $\geq$ 20 at.%, Ni $\geq$ 36 at.%), representing ${\sim}100$ of $27,074$ feasible candidates -- a probability of $P \approx 6.5 \times 10^{-6}$ under random sampling. This dual role -- consistent with the KKT prediction that constrained optima lie on active constraint boundaries -- required feasibility-aware acquisition to access; hard filtering would have excluded this region entirely.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种风险感知的贝叶斯优化方法，在约束合金设计中平衡高性能与相稳定性风险。通过将可行性分类器集成到采集函数中，在Al-V-Cr-Mn-Fe-Co-Ni-Cu高熵合金体系中，仅合成48种合金便探索了可行空间的0.12%，发现了两个性能极端组成区间。核心发现是：最优性能合金恰好位于相稳定边界（如V含量24 at.%时最强合金与失效合金共享相同成分点），这符合KKT条件——约束最优解位于约束边界上。硬过滤会完全排除该区域。
AI.motivation: 合金优化中，最高性能潜力成分往往位于相稳定边界，但该区域实验失败风险也最高。现有方法要么过于保守（硬过滤排除边界区域），要么忽略风险。需要一种既能访问高风险高回报边界区域又能控制失败概率的方法。
AI.method: 采用风险感知贝叶斯优化：1) 训练可行性分类器预测相稳定性；2) 将分类器概率化惩罚项集成到多目标采集函数中；3) 通过三次闭环迭代合成48种合金，优化五个目标（屈服强度、UTS/YS比、极限应变、动静态硬度比、穿透深度）。
AI.result: 从约27,000个CALPHAD筛选候选者中合成48种合金，探索0.12%可行空间。发现两个组成区间：V-rich/Ni-rich高强区（UTS达~1480 MPa，延伸率50%）和Mn-containing高塑区（UTS/YS达4.20，延伸率>50%）。钒同时驱动屈服强度(r=0.84)和sigma相形成(r=0.54)。最强合金集中在极窄区域（V≥20 at.%, Ni≥36 at.%），随机采样概率仅P≈6.5×10⁻⁶。
AI.conclusion: 证实了KKT条件的理论预测——约束最优解位于主动约束边界上。风险感知采集函数是访问这类边界区域的必要条件，硬过滤会完全丢失最优解。该方法为高风险高回报的材料优化提供了通用框架。

title: Quantum enhancement of information-mediated energy transfer
summary: Thermodynamics of information identifies information flow as a thermodynamic resource, but whether quantum coherence and collective coupling can enhance it at low entropy-production cost remains unresolved. We address this question for interacting open quantum systems by deriving a thermodynamic uncertainty relation that bounds information flow by entropy production in nonequilibrium steady states. We construct a quantum engine in which N-fold degenerate ground and excited states are collectively coupled to heat baths. Collective jumps enhance heat currents and information flow linearly with N, while entropy production remains independent of N, realizing a high-power, low-dissipation autonomous quantum Maxwell's demon that leverages collectively enhanced information flow to pump heat against a temperature gradient. Beyond steady states, collective interactions amplify the unitary component of quantum information flow, yielding a quadratic enhancement of the free-energy charging power of quantum batteries. Our results reveal scalable advantages of quantum coherence and collective effects in quantum engines.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了量子相干性和集体耦合可以增强量子引擎中的信息流（与N呈线性增长），同时保持熵产生与N无关，从而实现高功率、低耗散的量子麦克斯韦妖，并实现了量子电池充电功率的二次增强。
AI.motivation: 解决量子相干性和集体耦合能否在低熵产生成本下增强信息流这一未解问题。
AI.method: 推导了非平衡稳态下约束信息流与熵产生关系的热力学不确定关系；构造了N重简并基态和激发态集体耦合热浴的量子引擎。
AI.result: 集体跳跃使热流和信息流线性增长（~N），熵产生与N无关；集体相互作用使量子信息流的酉分量二次增强（~N²），实现量子电池自由能充电功率的二次增强。
AI.conclusion: 量子相干性和集体效应在量子引擎中具有可扩展优势，可实现高功率、低耗散的自洽量子麦克斯韦妖。

title: Non-Newtonian two-dimensional electron fluid in magnetic field
summary: We predict a mechanism for the non-Newtonian behavior of a two-dimensional (2D) electron fluid due to the local Joule heating of electrons. Within this mechanism, the electron shear viscosity is a non-monotonic function of the velocity gradient. This means that 2D electrons form an unusual non-Newtonian fluid, either dilatant or pseudoplastic, depending on the flow regime. We construct and solve the hydrodynamic equations for a hydrodynamic velocity and a corresponding temperature profile for a Poiseuille-like flow geometry. We demonstrate that the considered non-Newtonian non-linearity induced by the local heating is apparently responsible for the nontrivial differential magnetoresistance observed for 2D electrons in ultra-high-quality GaAs quantum wells, so we conclude that a 2D non-Newtonian electron fluid is realized in these systems at high currents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种二维电子流体非牛顿行为的机制，源于局部焦耳加热导致的电子剪切粘度随速度梯度非单调变化。通过构建并求解泊肃叶流几何中的流体动力学方程，作者发现这种非牛顿非线性可以解释超高精度GaAs量子阱中观察到的非线性微分磁阻，表明高电流下二维非牛顿电子流体在这些体系中得以实现。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明二维电子气在低温下可表现出流体动力学行为，但其非牛顿性质（如剪切变稀或剪切增稠）尚未被充分解释。作者旨在揭示局部焦耳加热如何导致电子粘度的非单调变化，并解释实验中观察到的非线性微分磁阻现象。
AI.method: 作者提出局部焦耳加热导致电子剪切粘度随速度梯度非单调变化的机制。构建了包含速度场和温度场的流体动力学方程组，采用泊肃叶流动几何进行求解，分析了不同流动状态下的非牛顿行为（膨胀性/假塑性）。
AI.result: 发现二维电子流体在速度梯度变化时剪切粘度呈现非单调变化，导致其在不同流动状态下分别表现出膨胀性（dilatant）或假塑性（pseudoplastic）的非牛顿行为。该非牛顿非线性能够解释超高精度GaAs量子阱中观察到的非线性微分磁阻现象。
AI.conclusion: 高电流条件下，二维电子流体是一种非牛顿流体，其非牛顿行为由局部焦耳加热驱动，并在GaAs量子阱体系中被实验证实。

title: Optimal parameterization of nonequilibrium generalized master equations from discrete-time experimental data
summary: Kinetic analyses of experiments often require coarse-grained descriptions, but complex systems rarely conform to the widely used modeling assumptions of Markovianity and thermodynamic equilibrium. Memory is indeed a general and often inevitable consequence of coarse-graining. Markov state models (MSMs) are a popular choice of coarse-grained description, but require microstate assignments -- which are rarely experimentally tunable -- to macrostates that minimize memory. Generalized master equations (GMEs) circumvent this limitation of MSMs by explicitly capturing memory. However, GMEs are difficult to parameterize and usually formally approximate in the experimentally relevant discrete-time setting. Here we introduce a maximum-likelihood-based procedure to parameterize formally exact, physically feasible, discrete-time generalized master equations from experiments and simulations in and out of equilibrium. By adapting algorithms typically used in optimal transport, we construct physical-constraint-satisfying conditional-maximum-likelihood estimators of both exact Nakajima-Zwanzig memory kernels and time-convolutionless GME propagators in discrete time. Applying these estimators to three examples -- experimental recordings of Förster-resonance energy-transfer in an ion channel, experimental nanoparticle tracking of a processive molecular motor, and simulated folding of a benchmark protein domain -- we recover kinetic parameters including relaxation rates, irreversibilities, dwell times, and first-passage times. These results establish discrete-time GMEs as a physically and statistically principled alternative to MSMs for kinetic analyses of experimental and simulated biomolecular systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最大似然估计的方法，用于从实验和模拟数据中参数化精确、物理可行的离散时间广义主方程（GME），克服了马尔可夫状态模型（MSM）需要可调微观状态分配以及GME难以参数化的局限，并在三个生物系统实例中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 复杂系统的粗粒化描述往往不可避免地引入记忆效应（非马尔可夫性），而常用的马尔可夫状态模型（MSM）需要微观状态分配，这在实验中难以实现；广义主方程（GME）虽然可以显式捕获记忆，但参数化困难且在离散时间下通常只是形式上的近似。因此需要一种能精确参数化离散时间GME的统计方法。
AI.method: 采用最大似然估计方法，结合最优传输算法，构建满足物理约束（如概率守恒、细致平衡等）的条件最大似然估计器，分别估计离散时间下的Nakajima-Zwanzig记忆核和时间卷积less GME传播子。
AI.result: 在三个实例中成功恢复动力学参数：离子通道的Förster共振能量转移实验、分子马达的纳米粒子追踪实验以及蛋白质结构域折叠模拟，包括弛豫速率、不可逆性、驻留时间和首次通过时间等关键动力学参数。
AI.conclusion: 离散时间GME在物理上和统计上是一种有原则的、可替代MSM的方法，适用于实验和模拟生物分子系统的动力学分析。

title: PtyRANNOSAUR: Ptychography with Robust Artificial Neural Networks Optimized for Sub-Angstrom Accuracy and Ultrafast Reconstruction
summary: We present PtyRANNOSAUR, a data-driven neural network code that reconstructs atomic resolution electron ptychography data in seconds, 10-100x faster than standard methods. PtyRANNOSAUR uses convolutional autoencoders to map 4D-scanning transmission electron microscopy data to 2D phase images. Each model is trained on a large database of crystal structures and is tailored for a range of experimental parameters, such as accelerating voltage, convergence angle, defocus, and sample thickness. This approach yields high quality reconstructions without requiring any fine-tuning of hyperparameters. In addition, the code handles spatial partial coherence, multiple scattering, and scan position errors, which are critical for state-of-the-art electron ptychography reconstructions. By testing PtyRANNOSAUR on experimental and simulated data, we show that the neural networks accurately reconstruct atomic structures of a broad range of materials systems and can achieve high resolutions of $<0.5$ Å, comparable to the best iterative reconstructions of the same data. These advances enable near-live, state-of-the-art electron ptychography reconstructions.

AI.tldr: PtyRANNOSAUR是一种基于卷积自编码器的神经网络代码，能将4D扫描透射电镜数据在数秒内重建为原子分辨率相位图像，速度比标准方法快10-100倍，且无需超参数调优。
AI.motivation: 传统电子叠层成像重建方法计算速度慢（分钟至小时级），无法实现近实时重构，限制了其在实时实验观测中的应用。
AI.method: 采用卷积自编码器神经网络，在大规模晶体结构数据库上训练，将4D-STEM数据直接映射为2D相位图像，并针对不同实验参数（加速电压、会聚角、离焦量、样品厚度）定制模型。
AI.result: 重建速度比标准方法快10-100倍，达到<0.5 Å的高分辨率，与最优迭代重建方法相当，且能处理空间部分相干、多次散射和扫描位置误差等实际问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了近实时的、最先进的电子叠层成像重建，有望推动原子分辨率成像技术的实时化应用。

title: A Finite Element Method for Fluctuating Navier--Stokes Equations
summary: We introduce a finite-element framework for simulating thermal fluctuations in compressible fluids governed by the fluctuating Navier-Stokes equations. The method is designed to preserve the fundamental fluctuation-dissipation balance at the discrete level. This is achieved by defining the stochastic forcing term in the weak formulation, ensuring its covariance is proportional to the discrete viscous dissipation operator. A nodal quadrature rule is employed to eliminate unphysical mesh-scale correlations. The time integration is performed using the Crank-Nicolson scheme to maintain numerical stability and accuracy. The proposed approach is numerically validated in one, two, and three spatial dimensions, demonstrating its capability to correctly capture equilibrium fluctuation statistics across various discretisation parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于有限元框架的数值方法，用于模拟可压缩流体中由涨落纳维-斯托克斯方程控制的热涨落，并能在离散层面保持涨落-耗散平衡。
AI.motivation: 在可压缩流体的数值模拟中，需要在离散层面上准确保持热涨落与耗散之间的平衡关系，这是捕捉正确物理统计特性的关键。
AI.method: 采用有限元框架，将随机强迫项定义在弱形式中，确保其协方差与离散粘性耗散算子成正比；使用节点求积消除非物理的网格尺度相关性；采用Crank-Nicolson格式进行时间积分。
AI.result: 在一维、二维和三维空间中进行了数值验证，证明该方法能够在不同离散参数下正确捕捉平衡涨落统计特性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的有限元框架能有效模拟可压缩流体热涨落，在离散层面保持了涨落-耗散平衡，具有良好数值稳定性和准确性。

title: SU(4) Heisenberg model on the hyperhoneycomb lattice
summary: We study the ground state of the SU(4) Heisenberg model on the hyperhoneycomb lattice using three-dimensional projected entangled pair states. We show that it is possible to compute physical observables for the ground states using loop expansions, which converge quickly on tree-like lattices. Our extrapolations to the limit of infinite bond dimensions point toward gapless spin-liquid ground state.

AI.tldr: 本文使用三维投影纠缠对态研究超蜂窝晶格上的SU(4)海森堡模型基态，通过环展开快速收敛于树状晶格，外推至无限键维极限表明存在无能隙自旋液体基态。
AI.motivation: 研究超蜂窝晶格上SU(4)海森堡模型的基态性质，探索该系统中是否存在无能隙自旋液体相。
AI.method: 采用三维投影纠缠对态（PEPS）作为数值方法，结合环展开（loop expansions）在类树状晶格上进行计算，并通过外推至无限键维极限来获得基态物理可观测量的准确估计。
AI.result: 环展开在类树状晶格上收敛迅速；外推至无限键维极限的结果指向无能隙自旋液体基态。
AI.conclusion: 超蜂窝晶格上的SU(4)海森堡模型可能具有无能隙自旋液体基态。

title: Exceptional Points as Manifestations of Topological-Charge Breakdown in a Non-Hermitian Skyrmion
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures. Companion to "Exceptional Points as Manifestations of Analyticity Breakdown in the 't Hooft Model" (submitted to SciPost Physics). Data and code: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20862933
summary: The integer topological charge of a magnetic skyrmion is the standard emblem of topological protection. We ask what happens to that protection when the magnet is made non-Hermitian, with balanced gain and loss or a PT-symmetric anisotropy. A non-Hermitian skyrmion turns out to carry two charges that coincide in the Hermitian limit but part ways under deformation. The charge built from the right state alone is homotopy-protected: the PT flow reduces exactly to a Gilbert-type relaxation on the target sphere, so it cannot change under smooth evolution. The charge built from the biorthogonal left-right pair is complex, loses quantization as soon as the gain/loss is turned on, and breaks down at the exceptional point of the local generator -- a ring on the skyrmion's equator, where the biorthogonal Bloch field itself diverges. Topological protection of a skyrmion is therefore not a single statement once the dynamics is non-Hermitian: it splits at an exceptional point. This is the real-space topological counterpart of the analyticity breakdown a causal response function suffers at an exceptional point, both being manifestations of the same non-Hermitian degeneracy.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文研究了非厄米（PT对称）磁体中斯格明子的拓扑保护问题，发现非厄米斯格明子携带两种拓扑荷：基于右态的荷保持同伦保护，而基于双正交左右态的荷会失去量子化并在例外点处发散，表明拓扑保护在非厄米系统中分裂。
AI.motivation: 探究磁斯格明子在非厄米（具有增益-损耗平衡或PT对称各向异性）系统中的拓扑保护是否依然成立，以及传统的整数拓扑荷概念如何被修正或分裂。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，研究非厄米PT对称磁体中斯格明子的两种拓扑荷（右态荷与双正交左右态荷）的行为，并考察它们在例外点处的性质变化。
AI.result: 右态构建的拓扑荷受同伦保护，PT流等价于目标球面上的Gilbert型弛豫，因此不会在光滑演化下改变；而双正交左右态构建的荷是复数的，在增益/损耗开启后失去量子化，并在局部生成子的例外点（斯格明子赤道上的环）处发散，拓扑保护在此分裂。
AI.conclusion: 非厄米系统中斯格明子的拓扑保护不是单一概念，它在例外点处分裂为不同性质的两个方面，这对应于实空间中的拓扑对应物，与因果响应函数在例外点处的解析性破坏是同一非厄米简并的不同表现。

title: Thermal Corrections and Analysis on the Phase Stability of CsPbCl3 and Cs2AgSbCl6 during In-Situ Thermal Treatment
comment: 29 pages, 9 figures, supplementary information, 4 supplementary figures
summary: Cesium lead chloride (CsPbCl3) is a well known and principal model for inorganic perovskite halide optoelectronic research. The many available techniques including high temperature stability testing have been used to investigate the increasing interest in inorganic perovskites as primary layers in solar cell applications. Due to the nature of high temperature testing, the characterization technique, reproducibility, and the true sample temperature are vital in determining relative stability. By choosing CsPbCl3 in the investigation of the structural stability of perovskites at high temperatures, it acts as a baseline to create and verify a methodology that accurately probes sample temperature, phase transitions, and decomposition onsets. Therefore, we present a methodological approach to investigate the thermal interactions and stability of CsPbCl3 as a parent single perovskite halide based on ligand-assisted re-precipitation synthesis techniques. Where we use our approach to inform and probe thermal interactions in other cesium/chlorine compounds like Cs2AgSbCl6. By analyzing the stoichiometry and initial phases through investigations of the crystalline structure and particle morphology, we calculated temperature conversions using a control substrate and refinements to best estimate changing structure parameters. Using in-situ temperature dependent X-ray diffraction, we were able to effectively probe the phase transitions and decomposition temperatures of the investigated halide powders. Creating a process that can confirm known high temperature structural phenomena of model perovskite halides while verifying our true sample temperature. Which allowed for further testing on the thermal kinetics of on the double perovskite structure Cs2AgSbCl6 and will continue to allow us to test other perovskites and perovskite families of interest in modern high temperature perovskite halide research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于配体辅助再沉淀合成法的系统方法，以CsPbCl3为基准模型，通过原位变温X射线衍射精确探测钙钛矿卤化物的相变和分解温度，并验证了该方法在Cs2AgSbCl6双钙钛矿上的适用性。
AI.motivation: 高温测试中表征技术、可重复性和真实样品温度的准确性对确定钙钛矿相对稳定性至关重要，现有方法缺乏对上述因素的精确控制，需要建立可靠的方法学基线。
AI.method: 以CsPbCl3为基准模型，采用配体辅助再沉淀合成法制备样品，通过控制基底进行温度转换计算和精修，利用原位变温X射线衍射探测相变和分解温度，并将方法论推广至Cs2AgSbCl6双钙钛矿。
AI.result: 成功验证了模型钙钛矿卤化物已知的高温结构现象，确认了真实样品温度的准确性，并有效探测了Cs2AgSbCl6双钙钛矿的热动力学行为。
AI.conclusion: 该研究方法可作为高温钙钛矿卤化物研究的标准化工具，为其他钙钛矿及其家族的热稳定性测试提供了可靠的方法学基础。

title: Nonextensive Statistical Signatures of the Bilaterian Transition in Proteome Length Distributions
comment: Submitted to Eur. Phys. J. E
summary: Protein length distributions across the tree of life carry a quantitative signature of organismal complexity. Nonextensive statistical mechanics, through the Tsallis generalized entropy formalism, provides a natural framework for describing complex systems characterized by long-range correlations, scale invariance, and hierarchical organization -- features that classical Boltzmann-Gibbs statistics cannot accommodate. In this work, the complementary cumulative distribution function (CCDF) of protein lengths is analyzed within this framework for the reference proteomes of 22 fully sequenced organisms spanning the domains Archaea, Bacteria, and Eukarya, with deliberate sampling across the animal transition zone from sponges and cnidarians to higher bilaterians. Maximum likelihood (MLE) fitting of truncated discrete q-exponential distributions, with bootstrap 95% confidence intervals (CIs) reveals that the entropic index q resolves into three statistically distinct regimes: superextensive (q < 1) for prokaryotes, unicellular and non-animal multicellular eukaryotes, and basal animals; a boundary regime (CI on spanning unity) for the two cnidarians studied and the basal bilaterian C. teleta; and subextensive (q > 1) for all higher bilaterians, with q increasing monotonically across the four deuterostomes sampled from S. purpuratus (1.033) to H. sapiens (1.147). The q-exponential outperforms the ordinary exponential distribution across all 22 proteomes and becomes progressively more competitive against alternative two-parameter distributions as proteome complexity increases. These results identify the Tsallis entropic index as a continuous, physically interpretable indicator of proteome organizational complexity and extend the applicability of nonextensive statistical mechanics to proteomic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析22个物种（从原核生物到人类）的蛋白质长度分布，发现Tsallis熵指数q能够量化蛋白质组的组织复杂性：原核生物和低等真核生物表现为超广延性（q<1），高等两侧对称动物表现为亚广延性（q>1），且q值从海胆（1.033）到人类（1.147）单调递增。q-指数分布优于普通指数分布，可作为蛋白质组复杂性的连续物理指标。
AI.motivation: 传统Boltzmann-Gibbs统计无法描述生物复杂系统中的长程相关、尺度不变性和层级组织特征，需要一种更普适的统计力学框架来量化蛋白质组复杂性与生物体复杂性之间的关系。
AI.method: 对22个完全测序物种（涵盖古菌、细菌和真核生物，包括从海绵到人类的动物过渡区）的参考蛋白质组进行蛋白质长度互补累积分布函数（CCDF）分析，采用截断离散q-指数分布进行最大似然估计（MLE）拟合，并计算bootstrap 95%置信区间。
AI.result: 熵指数q可分为三个统计上不同的区域：超广延性（q<1，原核生物、单细胞及非动物多细胞真核生物、基生动物）；边界区（置信区间跨越1，两种刺胞动物和基生两侧动物C. teleta）；亚广延性（q>1，所有高等两侧对称动物）。q值在后口动物中从S. purpuratus（1.033）到H. sapiens（1.147）单调递增。q-指数分布优于普通指数分布，且与双参数分布的竞争力随蛋白质组复杂性增加而增强。
AI.conclusion: Tsallis熵指数q可作为蛋白质组组织复杂性的连续、可物理解释的指标，将非广延统计力学的应用范围扩展到蛋白质组系统。

title: Theory of Electron Spin Resonance Scanning Tunneling Microscopy: The First Decade
summary: Electron spin resonance in scanning tunneling microscopy enabled the study of electronic transitions of magnetic impurities on surfaces at the atomic scale. This ESR-STM technique allows to spectroscopically probe and coherently manipulate spins using an all-electrical method without oscillating external magnetic driving fields. Here, we aim to review recent advancements in ESR-STM. We will discuss possible fundamental mechanisms by which the electric field drives spin resonance based on Heisenberg exchange, Kondo scattering, and Anderson impurity models. We validate theoretical predictions against experimental observations, to understand how electronic correlations, spin exchange, and many-body effects manifest in ESR-STM signals. After reviewing coherent spin control in the STM junction, we discuss potential applications of the ESR-STM method for coherent multi-spin control which enables multiple-qubit operations. Finally, we address recent developments in coupled electron-nuclear spin systems, including hyperfine-resolved ESR spectroscopy, and the driving and polarization of nuclear spins in ESR-STM.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了扫描隧道显微镜中的电子自旋共振（ESR-STM）技术，探讨了电场驱动自旋共振的机制、相干自旋控制及其在多量子比特操作和核自旋系统中的应用。
AI.motivation: ESR-STM技术无需外部振荡磁场，即可在原子尺度上实现单个磁性杂质的电子跃迁探测与自旋相干操控，但对其工作机制和潜在应用的系统理解仍不充分，因此需要综述该领域的最新进展。
AI.method: 基于Heisenberg交换、Kondo散射和Anderson杂质模型等理论框架，分析电场驱动自旋共振的微观机制；并通过理论预测与实验验证相结合的方式，探讨电子关联、自旋交换和多体效应在ESR-STM信号中的表现。
AI.result: 验证了理论预测与实验观测的一致性；实现了STM结中的相干自旋控制；展示了ESR-STM在多量子比特操控中的潜力；在电子-核自旋耦合系统中实现了超精细分辨的ESR光谱以及核自旋的驱动与极化。
AI.conclusion: ESR-STM是一种强大的全电学自旋探测与操控技术，未来有望在量子计算和多自旋量子比特系统中发挥重要作用。

title: Emergence of millimeter-wave resonances in self-assembled ferroelectric metamaterials
comment: 40 pages, including 21 main manuscript pages and supplementary
summary: Resonators are a key component in modern communications and computing. As demand and technological advances push component requirements into the terahertz regime, there is significant research devoted to the search for resonances at these frequencies. While uniform solid-state materials usually do not intrinsically feature resonances in this frequency range, self-assembled periodic arrays of ferroelectric nanodomains may provide an engineering route to design millimeter-wave properties. Here, we utilize prototypical dielectric-ferroelectric SrTiO3/PbTiO3 superlattices to robustly design periodic ferroelectric nano-scale domains. Phase field simulations predict an emergent domain breathing mode in complex polar textures and state-of-the-art millimeter-wave characterization shows evidence for such emergent resonances up to hundreds of GHz. Complex polar textures in these superlattices lead to emergent piezoelectric properties that also result in millimeter-wave resonances, which are predicted by second principles methods and confirmed by direct measurement. The principles investigated in this work suggest a new modality for ferroelectrics in the design of millimeter-wave electronics.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用SrTiO₃/PbTiO₃超晶格中的铁电纳米畴周期性排列，设计出可在数百GHz范围内工作的毫米波谐振器，为太赫兹电子器件提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 随着通信和计算技术向太赫兹频段发展，传统固态材料在此频率范围内缺乏本征谐振特性，亟需新的工程手段来设计毫米波谐振器件。
AI.method: 通过SrTiO₃/PbTiO₃超晶格自组装形成周期性铁电纳米畴；利用相场模拟预测畴呼吸模式；采用第一性原理方法和毫米波表征技术验证谐振特性。
AI.result: 相场模拟预测了复杂极性织构中存在畴呼吸模式；毫米波表征证实了高达数百GHz的谐振；超晶格中的极性织构产生了压电特性并导致毫米波谐振。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了通过铁电纳米畴工程可设计毫米波谐振器，为铁电材料在太赫兹电子器件中的应用开辟了新范式。

title: Comment on "Altermagnetic and Dipolar Spitting of Magnons in FeF_2" arXiv:2601.04303
summary: Conclusions by Sears et al. (arXiv: 2601.04303) about dispersions of magnons in rutile FeF_2 are unsound because compulsory lattice vibrations are omitted in the analysis of their neutron scattering spectra. Hybridized magnon-phonon modes in magnetically ordered FeF_2 were observed and successfully analysed half a century ago.

AI.tldr: 该文指出Sears等人的研究因忽略晶格振动，对FeF₂中磁振子色散的分析不可靠，并强调半个世纪前就已成功观测并分析了杂化的磁振子-声子模式。
AI.motivation: 指出Sears等人研究中忽略晶格振动的缺陷，并强调先前研究的正确性。
AI.method: 通过回顾历史研究（半个世纪前的实验与分析）来对比并指出现有研究的不足。
AI.result: Sears等人的磁振子色散结论因未考虑晶格振动而不可靠。
AI.conclusion: FeF₂中磁振子-声子杂化模式早已被成功观测和分析，忽略声子会导致错误结论。

title: Open Nanoacoustic Resonators Based on SrTiO$_3$/YBa$_2$Cu$_3$O$_{7-x}$ Superlattices
summary: We report the design and experimental demonstration of an open nanophononic cavity based on a hybrid oxide superlattice composed of SrTiO$_3$ (STO) and YBa$_2$Cu$_3$O$_{7-x}$ (YBCO), combined with a metallic Ni transducer for coherent phonon generation. The STO/YBCO periodic stack acts as an acoustic distributed Bragg reflector supporting confined longitudinal acoustic phonons in the sub-THz regime, while the Ni layer enables efficient ultrafast optical excitation and detection by time-domain Brillouin scattering. Transient reflectivity measurements reveal confined acoustic dynamics and a well-defined cavity resonance, in agreement with transfer-matrix calculations of acoustic reflectivity and mode profiles. These results demonstrate phonon confinement in multifunctional oxide heterostructures and establish complex oxide superlattices as a platform for hybrid nano-acoustic resonators and ultrafast phonon control of correlated electronic phases.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种基于STO/YBCO氧化物超晶格与Ni换能器结合的新型开放纳米声子腔，实现了亚THz声子限制与超快光激发-探测。
AI.motivation: 在多功能氧化物异质结构中实现声子限制，为超快声子调控关联电子相提供平台。
AI.method: 设计STO/YBCO周期性超晶格作为声学分布式布拉格反射器，结合Ni金属层实现超快光激发，通过时间域布里渊散射进行瞬态反射率测量。
AI.result: 观察到受限声子动力学和明确的腔共振，实验与传输矩阵计算结果吻合。
AI.conclusion: 证明复杂氧化物超晶格可作为混合纳米声学谐振器和超快声子调控的平台。

title: Entropy engineering of BF-BT-based high-entropy ceramics for ultra-high energy storage performance
summary: Dielectric capacitors are promising for pulsed power applications, but the energy storage performance of lead-free bulk ceramics is often limited by low breakdown strength and large ferroelectric hysteresis. Herein, a high entropy perovskite oxide BaTi0.2Zr0.2Sn0.2Hf0.2Nb0.1Sc0.1O3 was introduced into the BF-BT matrix to develop lead free high entropy ferroelectric ceramics. Multicomponent B-site substitution induces lattice distortion, enhanced pseudocubic characteristics, relaxor behavior, and grain refinement. These effects suppress polarization hysteresis and electrical conduction, resulting in a significant increase in breakdown strength. A maximum breakdown strength of 840 kV/cm1 and a recoverable energy density of 10.55 J/cm3 were achieved. Entropy-induced microstructural heterogeneity promotes a more uniform electric-field distribution and delays dielectric breakdown. This work demonstrates entropy engineering as an effective route to achieving high breakdown strength and superior energy-storage performance in lead-free ferroelectric ceramics.

AI.tldr: 通过高熵设计在BF-BT基陶瓷中引入多元B位取代，实现了840 kV/cm的超高击穿强度和10.55 J/cm³的可恢复能量密度，证明了熵工程是提升无铅铁电陶瓷储能性能的有效途径。
AI.motivation: 无铅介质电容器在脉冲功率应用中潜力巨大，但常受限于低击穿强度和大的铁电滞后，亟需一种有效策略来同时提升这两个关键性能指标。
AI.method: 将高熵钙钛矿氧化物BaTi0.2Zr0.2Sn0.2Hf0.2Nb0.1Sc0.1O3引入BF-BT基体中，利用多元B位取代诱导晶格畸变、增强赝立方特性、弛豫行为及晶粒细化，从而抑制极化滞后和电导，提升击穿强度。
AI.result: 最大击穿强度达到840 kV/cm，可恢复能量密度达到10.55 J/cm³。熵诱导的微观结构不均匀性促进了更均匀的电场分布，延迟了介质击穿。
AI.conclusion: 熵工程是实现无铅铁电陶瓷高击穿强度和优异储能性能的有效途径。

title: Competing spin-1 and spin-2 regimes in a frustrated four-leg spin-1/2 ladder
summary: We investigate a frustrated four-leg spin-$1/2$ ladder using density matrix renormalization group calculations. The uniform system displays three regimes: short-range antiferromagnetic legs, short-range ferromagnetic legs, and an effective spin-2 Heisenberg chain, separated by a crossover and a first-order transition. The spin-2 regime is confirmed through its finite string order parameter, edge-localized excitations, and excellent agreement with a projected $S_r=2$ effective Hamiltonian. Recasting the model as two frustrated two-leg ladders coupled by rung and diagonal interactions, we track how the trivial and Haldane phases of an isolated ladder evolve as interladder couplings are introduced. The resulting phase diagrams reveal crossover and first-order lines whose locations are captured by the spin-2 projection and show how singlet- and triplet-dominated regimes reorganize when two ladders merge into a four-leg structure, clarifying the emergence of effective spin-1 versus spin-2 behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文利用密度矩阵重整化群计算，研究了一个受挫的四腿自旋-1/2梯子，发现其存在三种不同区域：短程反铁磁腿、短程铁磁腿以及有效的自旋-2海森堡链，并阐明了当两个两腿梯子合并为四腿结构时，有效自旋-1与自旋-2行为的出现机制。
AI.motivation: 理解受挫自旋梯子系统中有效自旋行为的涌现机制，特别是当多个两腿梯子耦合形成多腿结构时，系统如何从自旋-1（Haldane相）过渡到自旋-2行为。
AI.method: 采用密度矩阵重整化群（DMRG）计算方法，分析受挫四腿自旋-1/2梯子；通过将模型重新表述为两个受挫两腿梯子耦合结构，追踪引入梯间耦合后Haldane相和普通相的演化。
AI.result: 发现三个不同的区域：短程反铁磁腿、短程铁磁腿和有效的自旋-2海森堡链，后者的存在通过有限弦序参量、边缘局域激发以及与投影自旋-2有效哈密顿量的极好吻合得到确认。相图中识别出了过渡线和一级相变线。
AI.conclusion: 成功阐明了四腿自旋-1/2梯子中有效自旋-2行为的涌现机制，以及两个两腿梯子耦合如何导致从自旋-1到自旋-2行为的重组，为理解复杂受挫自旋系统中的有效模型提供了新视角。

title: Hidden valley dynamics behind vanishing circular polarization in moiré excitons
summary: Optically addressable valley degrees of freedom in transition-metal dichalcogenide heterostructures provide a powerful platform for valleytronic and quantum-optical functionalities. In moiré superlattices, interlayer excitons inherit valley-contrasting optical selection rules while acquiring long lifetimes, electric dipoles, and site-dependent optical responses. However, because conventional measurements typically probe time-integrated valley polarization, the dynamical origin of vanishing polarization has remained elusive. Here, we show that a nearly zero steady-state valley polarization in electrically tunable moiré excitons does not necessarily indicate fast valley relaxation. Helicity-resolved time-resolved photoluminescence reveals a temporal crossing between co- and cross-circularly polarized emission, indicating that helicity-opposite dynamical components coexist and compensate after time integration. A minimal two-channel model, representing A-like and B-like moiré emission channels with opposite optical selection rules and distinct effective decay/depolarization rates, reproduces the observed helicity crossing without invoking a single rapid valley relaxation process. Furthermore, two-dimensional gate-field maps show that the crossing time evolves systematically with electrostatic tuning, demonstrating that the hidden valley dynamics are electrically controllable. These results show that time-integrated circular polarization can give a false-negative indication of valley polarization in multichannel valley emitters.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过时间分辨光致发光光谱揭示了扭曲双层过渡金属硫属化物异质结中，近零稳态谷极化并非一定源于快速谷弛豫，而是由具有相反光学选择规则和不同衰减/去极化速率的A类和B类莫尔发射通道共同作用产生的动力学补偿现象，并且该隐藏的谷动力学可通过电场调控。
AI.motivation: 传统时间积分测量无法揭示谷极化消失的动力学起源，可能导致对谷极化状态的错误判断。作者希望澄清近零稳态谷极化是否一定意味着快速的谷弛豫，并探索更精确的谷动力学表征方法。
AI.method: 采用圆偏振分辨的时间分辨光致发光光谱（TRPL）测量，结合二维栅压调控，并建立双通道模型（A-like和B-like莫尔发射通道）来解释观测到的圆偏振时间交叉现象。
AI.result: 观察到同向和反向圆偏振发射的时间交叉现象；发现近零稳态极化是由两个具有相反光学选择规则和不同衰减率的发射通道动力学补偿导致；交叉时间随电学调控系统性地演化。
AI.conclusion: 时间积分圆偏振测量在多通道谷发射体中可能产生谷极化的假阴性指示；隐藏的谷动力学可通过电场有效调控。

title: CoTAR: Topology and Atomic State Reconstruction in Condensed Phases
summary: Universal machine learning interatomic potentials (uMLIPs) enable condensed-phase molecular dynamics (MD) simulations with near-first-principles accuracy, but their lack of explicit molecular topology limits bond-aware analysis and reconnection to classical force fields. Here, we present CoTAR, a hybrid graph neural network (GNN)--hidden Markov model (HMM) framework that reconstructs molecular topology, formal charges, and unpaired electrons from atomic species, coordinates, and total charge by combining message passing on a proximity graph with a van der Waals prior, chemical constraints, and temporal smoothing. Across 128 nonreactive, topology-preserving condensed-phase systems, CoTAR achieved a bond-order-weighted F1 score of 0.906 on classical-MD data; for uMLIP trajectories, few-shot fine-tuning improved the valid-snapshot rate from 38.6\% to 84.7\%. The reconstructed topologies also supported downstream classical MD simulations, and HMM smoothing improved system-level MD simulation feasibility from 83.6\% to 85.9\%, indicating that CoTAR provides a practical framework for bond-aware analysis of condensed-phase uMLIP trajectories.

AI.tldr: CoTAR是一个结合图神经网络与隐马尔可夫模型的混合框架，能够从原子种类、坐标和总电荷中重建分子拓扑结构、形式电荷和未配对电子，在凝聚相uMLIP轨迹的键感知分析中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 通用机器学习原子间势能（uMLIPs）虽能实现接近第一性原理精度的凝聚相分子动力学模拟，但缺乏显式分子拓扑结构，限制了键感知分析及与经典力场的重新连接。
AI.method: 提出CoTAR框架，结合图神经网络（GNN）与隐马尔可夫模型（HMM），在近邻图上进行消息传递，并融合范德华先验、化学约束和时间平滑策略，从原子种类、坐标和总电荷中重建分子拓扑。
AI.result: 在128个非反应性、拓扑保持的凝聚相系统中，CoTAR在经典MD数据上达到0.906的键序加权F1分数；在uMLIP轨迹上，少样本微调将有效快照率从38.6%提升至84.7%，HMM平滑将系统级MD模拟可行性从83.6%提升至85.9%。
AI.conclusion: CoTAR为凝聚相uMLIP轨迹的键感知分析提供了一个实用框架，能够有效重建拓扑结构并支持下游经典MD模拟。

title: Ferrimagnetic and Haldane-type phases in a mixed-spin $1$-$\tfrac{1}{2}$-$\tfrac{1}{2}$ quantum trimer chain
summary: Bipartite Lieb-Mattis ferrimagnetism and the symmetry-protected Haldane phase are paradigmatic mechanisms in quasi-one-dimensional quantum magnets. Both emerge, in distinct regimes, in a mixed-spin $1$-$\tfrac{1}{2}$-$\tfrac{1}{2}$ Heisenberg trimer chain with antiferromagnetic backbone exchange $J$ and a side spin-$\tfrac{1}{2}$ coupled to each backbone spin by an exchange $J_t$ of either sign. Using the density matrix renormalization group, we compute magnetization curves and the entanglement spectrum and entropy. For $J_t>0$ a robust ferrimagnetic plateau forms at magnetization per unit cell $m=1$, whose multiplet entropy reflects how the conserved magnetization splits between the halves. For $J_t<0$ an $m=0$ plateau opens and grows with $|J_t|$, while the $m=1$ plateau closes. As $J_t\to-\infty$ the chain maps onto a spin-$1$ Heisenberg chain with coupling $J/2$: the $m=0$ width $Δh\simeq 0.196$ matches half the Haldane gap. Exponentially localized spin-$\tfrac{1}{2}$ edge states and the even-fold degeneracy of the entanglement spectrum confirm the Haldane character of the $m=0$ phase.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种混合自旋1-½-½的海森堡三聚体链，发现当耦合参数J_t>0时出现亚铁磁平台（m=1），当J_t<0时出现Haldane相平台（m=0），后者具有边缘态和纠缠谱简并等拓扑特征。
AI.motivation: 探究准一维量子磁体中两类重要机制——双粒子Lieb-Mattis亚铁磁性与对称性保护Haldane相——在混合自旋三聚体链中的共存与竞争关系。
AI.method: 使用密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）方法，计算磁化曲线、纠缠谱和纠缠熵。
AI.result: J_t>0时出现m=1亚铁磁平台，其多重态熵反映磁化在子格间的分配；J_t<0时m=0平台随|J_t|增大而打开，m=1平台关闭；当J_t→-∞时，体系映射为自旋1链，m=0平台宽度Δh≈0.196，恰好为Haldane能隙的一半。
AI.conclusion: J_t<0时m=0相具有Haldane相特征：存在指数局域的自旋½边缘态，纠缠谱呈现偶重简并，证实其拓扑Haldane性质。

title: Determining Electron Beam Lateral Coherence in a Scanning Electron Microscope Using Electron Diffraction
summary: We develop and characterize scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM) capabilities within a scanning electron microscope (SEM) to investigate the effective lateral coherence of the electron beam (e-beam) in the specimen plane. Using single-crystalline Au flakes and a sample composed of a monolayer of graphene, we obtain high-quality selected-area electron diffraction (SAED) maps and convergent-beam electron diffraction (CBED) patterns, validating the systems ability to probe crystallographic information at an acceleration voltage of 30 keV. Building on these capabilities, we implement a method, which is adapted from techniques traditionally used in transmission electron microscopy, to measure the degree of lateral coherence of the e-beam in the specimen plane of the SEM. By analyzing interference between electrons with two different wave vectors separated by 0.031 per angstrom, we extract a lower limit for the degree of lateral coherence over 5% of the e-beam diameter of approximately 60%. These coherence values are sufficient to enable quantum-coherent electron-light-matter interaction experiments in the SEM.

AI.tldr: 本文在扫描电子显微镜中开发了扫描透射电镜能力，利用30 keV电子束获得金箔和石墨烯的高质量衍射图，并测量了电子束在样品面的横向相干度下限约60%，足以实现量子相干电子-光-物质相互作用实验。
AI.motivation: 在SEM中实现STEM能力，测量电子束的横向相干度，以验证是否能够支持量子相干电子-光-物质相互作用实验。
AI.method: 在SEM中搭建STEM系统；利用单晶金箔和单层石墨烯获取SAED图和CBED图案；通过分析波矢差为0.031/Å的两束电子干涉，提取横向相干度。
AI.result: 获得了高质量SAED图和CBED图案；测得横向相干度下限约60%（覆盖电子束直径的5%）。
AI.conclusion: 该相干度足以在SEM中开展量子相干电子-光-物质相互作用实验。

title: Circularly Polarized Magneto-Photoluminescence in Two-Dimensional Chiral Perovskites R- and S-(C4H9NH3)2PbI4 under High Magnetic Fields
summary: We report circularly polarized magneto-photoluminescence (MPL) measurements on the enantiomeric pair of two-dimensional chiral perovskites R- and S-(C4H9NH3)2PbI4 in pulsed magnetic fields up to 50 T at 4.2 K. The R-form exhibits strong preferential emission into the RC channel (I_RC/I_LC = 10:1), with the S-form showing the opposite sense, robust against the applied field. Three key observations are reported: (i) an anomalous redshift of all exciton transition energies with increasing field-contrasting with the normal diamagnetic blueshift of achiral perovskites-with a non-monotonic initial blueshift to 7.6 T in the dominant RC channel of the R-form; (ii) complete invariance of PL peak positions upon reversal of the field direction, consistent with Rashba-induced mixing of the bright exciton with a nearby m_x = 0 dark state; and (iii) field-induced increase in PL intensity and narrowing of the linewidth, attributed to suppression of disorder scattering as the cyclotron orbit contracts. These results are interpreted in the framework of Rashba spin-splitting and polaron formation in the chiral two-dimensional perovskite lattice.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了二维手性钙钛矿R-和S-(C4H9NH3)2PbI4在脉冲磁场高达50 T、4.2 K条件下的圆偏振磁光致发光测量。R型表现出强烈的右旋圆偏振优先发射（I_RC/I_LC = 10:1），S型则相反。发现了三个关键现象：反常的激子跃迁红移、磁场方向反转时PL峰位完全不变、以及磁场诱导的PL增强和线宽窄化，这些结果通过Rashba自旋劈裂和极化子形成来解释。
AI.motivation: 探究二维手性钙钛矿中手性与自旋-轨道耦合（Rashba效应）的相互作用机制，理解手性钙钛矿中独特的磁光响应行为。
AI.method: 采用脉冲磁场（高达50 T）下的圆偏振磁光致发光测量，对手性钙钛矿R-和S-(C4H9NH3)2PbI4进行光谱分析，比较不同手性对映体在磁场下的光学响应。
AI.result: (i) 激子跃迁能量随磁场增加出现反常红移（非手性钙钛矿为蓝移），且在R型主导RC通道中观察到7.6 T处的非单调初始蓝移；(ii) 磁场方向反转时PL峰位完全不变；(iii) 磁场导致PL强度增加和线宽变窄。
AI.conclusion: 手性二维钙钛矿中观察到的独特磁光行为可归因于Rashba自旋劈裂导致的亮激子与m_x=0暗态混合，以及极化子形成效应，这为理解手性钙钛矿的自旋相关光电特性提供了新见解。

title: Population-Dominated Ergotropy in a Capacitively Coupled Double-Quantum-Dot Battery under 1/f Charge Noise
summary: We investigate extractable work storage in a capacitively coupled double quantum dot (DQD) quantum battery (QB) subjected to experimentally motivated detuning charge noise. The battery is modeled as two interacting charge qubits with an Ising-type capacitive coupling and is charged by resonant microwave modulation of the tunnel coupling channel. Detuning fluctuations are introduced as classical stochastic processes generated from a band-limited 1/f noise spectrum. For each noise realization, the evolution remains unitary, whereas decoherence and loss of contrast emerge after ensemble averaging. We analyze the total ergotropy, its population and coherent contributions, the energy basis populations, a passive ordering violation diagnostic, and the Jensen-Shannon coherence of the noise-averaged state. The results show that resonant tunnel coupling driving selects a dominant E0 <-> E3 population transfer channel in the interacting DQD spectrum. The dominant extractable work is stored in non-passive population distributions, in agreement with recent population ordering interpretations of ergotropy in QBs, while coherence accompanies and supports the resonant transfer as a transient dynamical resource. Detuning noise reduces the energy basis coherence amplitude and also weakens the population transfer pathway responsible for the dominant population ergotropy. This framework provides a noise-aware description of semiconductor QB charging based on extractable work rather than on injected energy alone.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了电容耦合双量子点（DQD）量子电池在失调电荷噪声下的可提取功存储，发现共振隧穿耦合驱动主导了E0↔E3布居转移通道，可提取功主要存储在非被动布居分布中，而噪声会同时降低相干性和布居转移效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的量子电池研究多关注注入能量，但实际应用中可提取功才是关键；半导体量子点实验不可避免存在电荷噪声，亟需建立噪声感知的充电描述框架。
AI.method: 将DQD量子电池建模为两个具有Ising型电容耦合的电荷量子比特，通过共振微波调制隧穿通道充电；将失调涨落生成为带限1/f噪声谱的经典随机过程，对每次噪声实现进行幺正演化后做系综平均。
AI.result: 共振隧穿耦合驱动选择E0↔E3主导布居转移通道；可提取功主要来自非被动布居分布；失调噪声同时降低能量基相干振幅和布居转移路径强度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了基于可提取功而非注入能量的半导体量子电池噪声感知充电描述，支持布居排序解释的可提取功机制。

title: Amorphous Fe-Sn nanofilms for anomalous-Nernst heat-flux sensing
summary: Amorphous magnetic films are promising for anomalous-Nernst heat-flux sensing because their low thermal conductivity can enhance the temperature gradient generated by an applied heat flux. However, amorphization often degrades electronic transport and thermoelectric properties, making it challenging to obtain a large anomalous Nernst response in structurally disordered films. Here, we demonstrate nanometer-thick amorphous Fe-Sn films as high-sensitivity anomalous-Nernst heat-flux sensing materials. By systematically controlling composition and thickness, we find that amorphous Fe-Sn nanofilms combine a large anomalous Nernst response with low thermal conductivity, resulting in a heat-flux sensitivity of 0.37 um/A. This value exceeds the sensitivities reported for both amorphous magnetic thin films and representative crystalline topological magnets. X-ray diffraction and Mossbauer spectroscopy show that the optimized films lack long-range crystallinity while retaining local Fe-Sn environments, suggesting that short-range atomic order contributes to the anomalous Nernst response in the amorphous matrix. The sensitivity is also reproduced on flexible polymer substrates, indicating compatibility with mechanically compliant device architectures. These results establish amorphous Fe-Sn nanofilms as a platform for anomalous-Nernst heat-flux sensing and provide a materials design route based on local-structure control and thermal-conductivity reduction.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了非晶Fe-Sn纳米薄膜作为高灵敏度反常能斯特热流传感材料，其热流灵敏度达到0.37 μm/A，超过了现有非晶磁性薄膜和拓扑晶体磁体的报道值，且可在柔性基底上制备。
AI.motivation: 非晶磁性薄膜因其低热导率能增强热流产生的温度梯度，有望用于反常能斯特热流传感；但非晶化通常会劣化电子输运和热电性能，使得在结构无序薄膜中获得大的反常能斯特响应具有挑战性。
AI.method: 通过系统控制成分和厚度，制备了纳米级厚度的非晶Fe-Sn薄膜；利用X射线衍射和穆斯堡尔谱表征结构，并在刚性及柔性基底上测试其热流灵敏度。
AI.result: 非晶Fe-Sn纳米薄膜兼具大的反常能斯特响应和低热导率，热流灵敏度达0.37 μm/A，优于现有非晶磁性薄膜和代表性晶体拓扑磁体；该灵敏度可在柔性聚合物基底上复现。
AI.conclusion: 非晶Fe-Sn纳米薄膜为反常能斯特热流传感提供了新的材料平台，并提出了基于局域结构控制和热导率降低的材料设计路线。

title: Role of the Casimir force in the capacitive radio-frequency microelectromechanical switches
summary: We determine the role of the fluctuation-induced Casimir force acting between a membrane of cylindrical shape and a bottom electrode in microelectromechanical capacitive switches. For this purpose, the Casimir force is computed taking into account the real properties of both a membrane and a bottom electrode materials with account of surface roughness. The obtained results are compared with those found for the smooth surfaces using the idealization of ideal metal. It is shown that an account of both the real material properties and surface roughness is crucial for obtaining the correct values of the Casimir force. According to our results, at the shortest separations, when the switch membrane is in contact with the transmission line, the magnitudes of the Casimir force may exceed the magnitudes of the electric one depending on the value of the operating voltage. The obtained values of the Casimir force can be used for determining the thickness of the switch membrane, which ensures the necessary magnitude of the restoring elastic force required for a stable cyclic functioning of the micromechanical switch with no pull-in.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了微机电电容式开关中圆柱形薄膜与底部电极之间的Casimir力，考虑实际材料特性和表面粗糙度，发现这些因素对获得正确的Casimir力至关重要，且在短距离下Casimir力可能超过静电力，影响开关的稳定工作。
AI.motivation: 确定涨落诱导的Casimir力在微机电电容式开关中对圆柱形薄膜与底部电极之间作用的重要性，并评估实际材料属性和表面粗糙度对其影响。
AI.method: 计算考虑实际材料特性和表面粗糙度的Casimir力，并与理想光滑金属表面的结果进行比较。
AI.result: 实际材料特性和表面粗糙度对获得正确的Casimir力至关重要；在最短间距时，Casimir力大小可能超过静电力，具体取决于工作电压。
AI.conclusion: 所得Casimir力可用于确定开关薄膜厚度，以确保恢复弹性力足够大，从而实现稳定的循环工作，避免吸合失效。

title: Vacancy-mediated nitrogen diffusion and aggregation via high-fluence electron beam irradiation in HPHT synthesized diamond crystal
summary: The negatively charged nitrogen vacancy (NV-) center in diamonds is promising point defect for highly sensitive quantum sensing. The formation of high-density NV- centers is essential for improving sensitivity. We performed room-temperature electron beam irradiation (EBI) and annealing on nitrogen-doped high-pressure high-temperature diamond crystals to convert substitutional nitrogen into NV centers. In the low-fluence region of EBI, neutral substitutional nitrogen (Ns0) concentration decreased and NV0 and NV- center concentration increased with increasing EBI fluence. The decrease in Ns0 concentration was comparable to the increase in total NV center concentration; thus, the conversion from Ns0 to NV0 and NV- centers is a dominant defect formation process. In a high-fluence region, NV0 and NV- center and Ns0 and Ns+ concentrations decreased with increasing EBI fluence, indicating the formation of unknown nitrogen-related defects such as the H3 center, which is a nitrogen and vacancy aggregation defect. Although H3 centers were observed at high EBI fluence, their forming annealing temperature of 1375 +- 25 degrees Celsius was lower than the typically reported temperatures over 1600 degrees Celsius. We attribute this low-temperature formation to vacancy-mediated nitrogen diffusion and aggregation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了室温电子束辐照和退火处理对氮掺杂金刚石中NV色心形成的影响，发现低辐照通量下NV中心浓度随通量增加而增加（来自Ns0的转换），高辐照通量下出现未知氮相关缺陷（如H3中心），且H3中心在较低温度（~1375°C）形成，归因于空位介导的氮扩散与聚集。
AI.motivation: 高密度NV-中心对提升量子传感灵敏度至关重要，但如何有效将金刚石中的替代氮转化为NV中心仍需深入探索。
AI.method: 对氮掺杂高温高压金刚石进行室温电子束辐照（不同通量）后退火处理，利用光谱方法分析Ns0、NV0、NV-及H3中心等缺陷浓度的变化规律。
AI.result: 低通量区：Ns0下降，NV0和NV-上升，且Ns0减少量≈总NV增加量，表明直接转换占主导。高通量区：NV、Ns浓度均下降，出现H3中心；H3形成温度（1375±25°C）低于文献报道的1600°C以上。
AI.conclusion: 低通量下NV色心形成主要来自Ns0的直接转换；高通量下氮相关缺陷（如H3）通过空位介导的氮扩散与聚集在较低温度形成，揭示了缺陷形成机制对NV产率的重要影响。

title: Interlayer electric multipole Hall effect in twisted multilayers
summary: Electrons in layered van der Waals materials possess a layer pseudospin characterizing their wave-function distribution among layers. In twisted structures, this pseudospin forms nontrivial textures, leading to intriguing phenomena such as the layer Hall effect (LHE), where distinct layer Hall currents flow despite the presence of time-reversal symmetry. In chiral bilayers, LHE manifests as an interlayer electric dipole Hall effect with Hall counterflows and a concomitant in-plane magnetic dipole. Multilayers host richer layer-dependent Hall currents, generating interlayer electric multipole Hall effects and in-plane magnetic multipoles. We start from exploring the interlayer electric quadrupole Hall effect in mirror-symmetric twisted trilayers. At small twist angles, interlayer translation efficiently tunes layer Hall current magnitudes. At large angles and low doping, the currents can be well accounted for by adding the contributions from the two individual twisted interfaces. This decomposition allows obtaining layer-resolved Hall currents in large-angle twisted multilayers even without well-defined periodicity.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了扭曲层状范德华材料中由层赝自旋驱动的层霍尔效应，包括双层中的层间电偶极霍尔效应及多层中更丰富的层依赖霍尔电流，特别关注了镜像对称扭曲三层中的层间电四极霍尔效应，并探讨了扭曲角、层间平移等调控机制。
AI.motivation: 探索扭曲层状范德华材料中层赝自旋纹理产生的新奇层霍尔效应，揭示多层结构中更丰富的层依赖霍尔电流及其物理机制。
AI.method: 通过理论分析扭曲双层和三层结构中的层赝自旋物理，研究小角度和大角度扭曲下的层霍尔电流行为，并利用界面分解方法分析多层结构的层分辨霍尔电流。
AI.result: 发现镜像对称扭曲三层中存在层间电四极霍尔效应；小扭曲角下层间平移可有效调控层霍尔电流大小；大角度低掺杂下电流可由两个扭曲界面的贡献叠加解释。
AI.conclusion: 层赝自旋在扭曲结构中形成非平庸纹理，驱动多种层霍尔效应，多层结构中可能存在更丰富的层间电多极霍尔效应和面内磁多极。

title: Three-dimensional visualization of threading dislocation in GaN by polarized-light microscopy
summary: We demonstrate high-throughput three-dimensional imaging of threading dislocations in ammonothermal GaN wafers using polarized-light microscopy with collimated LED illumination. Threading dislocations exhibited focal-depth-dependent in-plane shifts, enabling visualization of their three-dimensional inclination behavior over large areas. Synchrotron radiation X-ray topography indicated that dislocations with identical in-plane Burgers vector components tended to exhibit similar trace geometries and inclination directions.
